architectReview.evidence: Architect re-reviews stage-10..13: summary.md drops fixed (intro section + single-owner assignment, incl t==duration); scene_coverage capped carry-forward detects mid/tail/pre-first-keyframe stalls while passing static slides on dense raw samples; titles escaped; empty intro skipped without dropping speech; raw-samples contract enforced at library boundary via coverage_inputs_from_extraction. Final CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR + APPROVE, 0 blockers; all MEDIUM/LOW RESOLVED.

executorQa.evidence: Executor red-team added tests/test_redteam_synthesis.py (12 cases incl. de-xfailed no-drop property). Suite 78 passed. Surface = algorithm/library via pytest; GUI/web/api not applicable for G002.
redTeamCommands: uv run --with pytest --with numpy pytest -q tests/test_redteam_synthesis.py tests/test_coverage.py tests/test_summary_anchors.py

artifactRefs.description: Full pytest run (78 passed) incl. synthesis/coverage adversarial cases

contractCoverage.obligation: transcript.md and summary.md must not drop any in-duration utterance
summary.md carries TOC + coverage header + per-section timestamp + slide links, stable under special chars
gap/scene/artifact checks; static slide passes, stall fails, slide-without-text fails

contractCoverage.reason: G002 is deterministic synthesis/coverage library; UI deferred per spec non-goals.

surfaceEvidence.reason: CLI entrypoint is G003; G002 is library only.

adversarialCases.scenario: segments at t=0, before first slide, exactly at duration
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: every in-duration segment appears exactly once in summary.md

adversarialCases.scenario: pre-first-slide speech with first slide starting >0
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: intro section renders pre-slide speech; not dropped

adversarialCases.scenario: no slides / empty ocr_text / unicode+markdown-special titles

adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: TOC link text/heading not broken by special chars

adversarialCases.scenario: mid/tail keyframe-less stall beyond carry cap
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: uncovered speech bins -> scene coverage fails

adversarialCases.scenario: single static slide with dense raw samples

iteration.evidence: Initial G002 review surfaced a real blocker (summary segment drop) + MEDIUMs; resolved across commits (no-drop assignment, capped carry-forward, title escaping, raw-samples contract helper); full loop rerun cleanly to 78 passed and architect reached CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR + APPROVE.
